name: Eaton Corporation plc
description: Eaton Corporation plc is a multinational power management company that provides energy-efficient solutions to help customers effectively manage electrical, hydraulic, and mechanical power. The company operates through various segments, including Electrical Americas, Electrical Global, Aerospace, and Vehicle, serving diverse markets such as data centers, utilities, industrial, and residential. Eaton is dedicated to improving the quality of life and the environment through the use of power management technologies and services, focusing on sustainability and innovation to address the world's most urgent power management challenges.

investment_theses.company_type: Electrical Infrastructure / Powering New US Industrial Capacity
